creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144297
patch to fix staging orphans

Hi,

The audio/gsm port has two staging orphans:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: bin/tcat
Error: Orphaned: bin/untoast

I added those to the plist to fix this problem, can you approve the attached patch?

Thanks in advance.
